form.formComment: Comes here off a 43-day let-up. Last start won by 0.5 len at this track February 26 over 1106m defeating Wizardofez with 55.5kg at $7.60. The run before that ran last in a small field at Charles Town on January 17 over 1308m, 16 len behind Abolitionist with 56kg at $9.50. Won last start and is well-placed again.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months 4th of 10 at Parx on March 12 over 1308m, 4.5 len behind Guaio carrying 55.5kg at $3.50. Previously second-up 4th of 10 at Gulfstream Park Turf on March 28 2025 over 1609m, 5 len behind Anegada carrying 53.5kg at $47.60. Solid top-three hope.

form.formComment: Last start ran last of 7 at this track on March 20 over 1207m, 17 len behind Confiscated carrying 54.5kg at $10.60. Before that scored a big 6 len win at this track February 27 over 1673m defeating Skull Honor with 55.5kg at $1.40. Nicely placed to make amends.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 29-day let-up. Most recently 6th of 10 at Parx on March 12 over 1308m, 8 len behind Guaio carrying 55.5kg at $7.40. The race before that 4th of 7 at Parx on March 5 over 1308m, 14 len behind Carnaby with 53kg at $2.70. Capable of a better run.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months raced on the pace when 3rd of 7 at this track on March 20 over 1207m, 7 len behind Confiscated carrying 54.5kg at $3.70. Previously second-up 3rd of 7 at Presque Isle Downs on June 25 over 1207m, 2.5 len behind Just Relax carrying 56kg at $8.30. Among the leading chances.
